posts.author: Nodnat
posts.community: Asarfi Hospital Limited SME IPO (Asarfi Hospital IPO)
posts.text: Expectation might have been for sequential growth. Nevertheless, pause in Onco business due to receivables should be temporary. I believe the hospital is still undervalued at ~400 cr. Replacement value: We can take 1 cr per bed to be on the conservative side. Which for the multi speciality hospital would be around 300 cr. Then the Onco unit should get 1.5 cr per bed so 100 to 150 cr for the onco setup. (A linac plus bunker would alone cost 30-40 cr) At FY26 numbers: Business reported a Pre Ind AS Ebitda of 36 cr and 15xebitda should be easily justifiable. Crystalballgazing: For multi specialit…

posts.author: sam11owen
posts.community: Asarfi Hospital Limited SME IPO (Asarfi Hospital IPO)
posts.text: 42% Topline growth FY26 on FY25, EBITDA in line with topline increase and PAT even better at 58%. image 1010×762 132 KB Not sure why the stock went into a 20% lower circuit yesterday. the Q4 FY25 to Q4 FY26 numbers are that impressive with just 29% and also margins slightly coming down. Any other insights being missed here? Disc: just holding 1 lot, very small tracking position. confused between this and Unihealth for a larger position.
